title: log.export
description: Export a window of log entries to a JSON file at a user-chosen path. The format is fixed to JSON; the format field is retained for forward compatibility but is not surfaced as a user setting.

file_path.description: Absolute filesystem path of the export target. Parent directory must exist and be writable.

format.description: Fixed to 'json' in v1. Reserved for forward compatibility; not surfaced as a user setting.

level_min.description: Optional minimum severity bound. Defaults to debug.

since.description: Optional ISO-8601 lower bound on entry time (inclusive).

until.description: Optional ISO-8601 upper bound on entry time (exclusive).

include_diagnostics.description: Include source = 'diagnostic' entries. Defaults to false for exports.

file_path.description: Absolute path of the written file. Equal to the requested file_path on success.

bytes.description: Optional byte size of the written file.

errors.message: The chosen path is not writable. No file was created.
The parent directory of the chosen path does not exist.
since is not strictly before until, or one bound is malformed.
Requested format is not supported in v1. Only 'json' is accepted.
